message:
fix(search): normalize tags and aliases to lowercase for consistent matching

Ensures case-insensitive matching for tags and aliases across all search
paths by normalizing to lowercase at parse time.

Changes across search modules:

src/search/context.rs:
- SearchFilters::parse_tags() now lowercases tags during parsing
- User queries like "Rust" match skills tagged with "rust"

src/search/filters.rs:
- parse_tags_from_metadata() lowercases tags from skill metadata
- Consistent with query parsing for accurate matching

src/search/tantivy.rs:
- parse_metadata() lowercases both tags and aliases during indexing
- Index contains normalized values for Tantivy queries

Behavior before:
- Tag "Rust" in skill wouldn't match query "rust"
- Case-sensitive comparisons caused false negatives
- Inconsistent results based on capitalization

Behavior after:
- All tags/aliases normalized to lowercase at boundaries
- Query "Rust", "rust", "RUST" all match "rust" tag
- Consistent, predictable search behavior

This follows the principle of normalizing at system boundaries
(user input, metadata parsing, indexing) rather than at comparison time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
